caption:
BREAKING: New NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super Delivers 5x Higher Throughput for Agentic AI

Launched today, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is a 120‑billion‑parameter open model with 12 billion active parameters designed to run complex agentic AI systems at scale.  Available now, the model combines advanced reasoning capabilities to efficiently complete tasks with high accuracy

Source: NVIDIA Blog
